  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractDAO<T>
    A generic Data Access Object (DAO) that provides common CRUD operations for any type T.
    Address
    Represents an Address entity containing details such as ID, street name, street number, city, and judet .
    AddressDAO
    DAO class for managing Address records in the database.
    BusinessException
    Custom exception class for representing business logic errors.
    Client
    Represents a client with its associated details such as client ID, name, email, address ID, telephone number, and an address object.
    ClientBLL
    Business Logic Layer for handling client-related operations.
    ClientController
    The ClientController class handles the logic for responding to user interactions in the ClientView UI.
    ClientDAO
    DAO class for managing Client records and their associated Address records.
    ClientFormDialog
    ClientFormDialog is a specialized JDialog used to handle the creation or editing of client forms.
    ClientView
    The ClientView class represents the user interface for managing clients.
    ConnectionFactory
    Singleton class responsible for managing database connections.
    Main
    The Main class serves as the entry point and main user interface for the "Management System".
    Order
    Represents a product order placed by a client.
    OrderBLL
    Business Logic Layer for handling order-related operations.
    OrderDAO
    Data Access Object for handling operations related to Orders.
    OrderView
    A graphical user interface for managing orders.
    Product
    Represents a product that can be purchased.
    ProductBLL
    The ProductBLL class handles the business logic for managing products.
    ProductDAO
    Data Access Object for handling operations related to Products.
    ProductFormDialog
    Represents a dialog form for creating or editing products.
    ProductView
    The ProductView class provides the user interface for managing products.
    TableUtil
    Utility class to populate a JTable with data from a list of objects.
